description: Wednesday.app is an influencer marketing software platform for finding creators, contacting them, and managing influencer relationships and campaigns. Its website focuses on creator discovery, outreach, and campaign management for small businesses, agencies, and startups.
summary: Wednesday.app exposes a public MCP server at https://chatgpt-app.wednesday.app/mcp; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or CLI documentation was found on wednesday.app.
